nodes.text: Go back, kid. Mountain's cursed. Or haunted. Haven't decided which.
Been mining here forty years. Seen things. The old ruins below the mountain weren't built by goblins.
The King went through the eastern passage. Past the haunted armour. If you're set on this fool's errand, start there.
You opened the shrine? Then the Depths are waiting. I don't envy you, kid. But I'm rooting for you.
You came back from the Depths. I've seen a lot in forty years, but never that. You've got real grit, Grub.
